hooks.command: python3 -c "import os,json; cmd=json.loads(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT','{}') ).get('command',''); exit(0 if 'git commit' in cmd else 1)" && cargo fmt && git add -u
python3 -c "import os,json; cmd=json.loads(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT','{}') ).get('command',''); exit(0 if 'git commit' in cmd else 1)" && cargo clippy -- -D warnings
python3 -c "import os,json; cmd=json.loads(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT','{}') ).get('command',''); exit(0 if 'git commit' in cmd else 1)" && cargo test
